Uploaded April 10th, 2022 by halfridge
Send a correction
Post Comment
Once upon a time ....
QuoteReply
# Jul 15 2003 at 11:35 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592251709006
145 posts
Hi kids. today is story time. Now everyone gather around and listen up.
Once upon a time back around 1999 :)
Long before the lizards called Iksar roamed and the Dwarves were smarter then Gnomes.
Quests for magic could be found. Past the evil Teir'dal town.
Where lakes of boiling lava would spew. Temple of fire was there for you.
Yet those who knew not why, would always seem to try.
Balance was what they would promote, I think they just loved the smoke.
This ran over to the skys and the darkest spots to die.
The realm was all but new as was that balanced crew.
Now as Old ones meets the new. I ask myself 'why so many noobs'
But no one can hear my crys above the auctions, shouts and spoiled replys.
Infestation is abound yet the god of Balance cannot be found.
So be happy you are a newb. Cause at one time this gear was Ubb.
Someday you may leave the blue. And seek the start of this crew.
Where they use to kill the meek and really hated those that twinked.
Maybe you will find the meaning to a drunkards rhyme.
ONCE UPON A TIME WAS ONCE A BALANCED STATE OF MIND.

Valria <Rallos Zek>

Edited, Tue Jul 15 12:48:38 2003
▲ Page top
Good gawd
QuoteReply
# Mar 10 2003 at 5:37 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591786005671
150 posts
If SoE ever listened to some of you noobz this game would go all to hell faster than Anne-Nicole on a free buffet. Why not give all melee weapons haste since that is what all melee classes need? Why not give mana regen on all caster items? Why not give Wisdom to all priest wearable armor? Dumbasses need to quit complainin and play the game as it is. Peace.

Edited, Mon Mar 10 17:08:41 2003
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Mar 10 2003 at 5:33 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) with Eberk down there. In playing my cleric for almost three years I have seen TONS of cleric usable and even lots of cleric class specific armor with INT instead of WIS. its not really fair. it makes no sense. its like the developers are playing a joke on us.
sigh
QuoteReply
# Aug 23 2002 at 9:12 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591779273835
10 posts
I dont understand why these boots have 5int, well the ac is good but I would rather choose wis insted of int..
▲ Page top
Fear??
QuoteReply
# Nov 03 2001 at 4:15 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592251359122
5 posts
I won a pair of these off of a cube of jelly in Fear tonight as well.....
Interesting stuff!

PoF drop
QuoteReply
# Oct 11 2001 at 7:12 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591746810546
11 posts
Saw these things drop off some big cube of jelly in PoF the other night. Maybe he drops other EM, or maybe just drops randoms boots. Maybe it was an ingame fluke. /shrug. but it did happen on Fennin
▲ Page top
Hmmm?
QuoteReply
# Sep 27 2001 at 11:34 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592248758846
View User Forum
161 posts
I never really understood why alot of Cleric only items have +INT instead of +WIS...why would a cleric need +INT? Even when crafting Items doesnt it also check your WIS? Oh well...Good hunting and safe journey to all.
▲ Page top
Whoot!
QuoteReply
# Sep 25 2001 at 4:51 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591767817344
30 posts
Wow another spectacular piece of armor for clerics. 3 more ac then my Temple boots. About the same level of resistance although cold is more useful then disease. +5agility is not too shabby. +5int? Why? Ah well. Guess there will not be too many people rolling against me for these either.
